text_orig: 🎥WOW. The IDF releases footage of the historic moment an Israeli Air Force F-35I Adir shot down an Iranian Yak-130 — the first time ever that an F-35 has downed a manned fighter aircraft.
text_en: 🎥WOW. The IDF releases footage of the historic moment an Israeli Air Force F-35I Adir shot down an Iranian Yak-130 — the first time ever that an F-35 has downed a manned fighter aircraft.

text_orig:
🔥NEW: Iran’s ballistic missile fire is slowing sharply, with all missiles launched overnight intercepted by Israeli air defenses, according to the IDF. Meanwhile, Israeli assessments indicate the Iranian regime has suffered thousands of casualties since the start of the war.

Inside Israel, daily life is gradually reopening: gatherings of up to 50 people are now permitted and the country is preparing to resume outbound flights starting Sunday.

The threat has not disappeared — Hezbollah attacks from Lebanon may intensify and missile fire from Iran could continue — but the battlefield picture is increasingly clear: Israel’s defenses are holding, its military campaign is delivering heavy blows, and the Iranian regime is paying a steep price.
text_en:
🔥NEW: Iran’s ballistic missile fire is slowing sharply, with all missiles launched overnight intercepted by Israeli air defenses, according to the IDF. Meanwhile, Israeli assessments indicate the Iranian regime has suffered thousands of casualties since the start of the war.

Inside Israel, daily life is gradually reopening: gatherings of up to 50 people are now permitted and the country is preparing to resume outbound flights starting Sunday.

The threat has not disappeared — Hezbollah attacks from Lebanon may intensify and missile fire from Iran could continue — but the battlefield picture is increasingly clear: Israel’s defenses are holding, its military campaign is delivering heavy blows, and the Iranian regime is paying a steep price.

text_orig:
🚨**BREAKING**: Iran’s IRGC terrorists declared they have the right to control passage through the Strait of Hormuz during wartime and threatened to strike any vessel crossing it “illegally.” They also claim to have attacked a U.S. civilian oil tanker north of the Persian Gulf.

Tehran is openly escalating its aggression — threatening global shipping lanes and weaponizing one of the world’s most critical energy chokepoints.
text_en:
🚨**BREAKING**: Iran’s IRGC terrorists declared they have the right to control passage through the Strait of Hormuz during wartime and threatened to strike any vessel crossing it “illegally.” They also claim to have attacked a U.S. civilian oil tanker north of the Persian Gulf.

Tehran is openly escalating its aggression — threatening global shipping lanes and weaponizing one of the world’s most critical energy chokepoints.

text_orig:
**NEW**: The IDF confirms a new wave of strikes in Beirut, targeting additional Hezbollah terror command centers.

Among the targets: a headquarters used by Hezbollah’s aerial unit, involved in planning and executing attacks against Israeli forces and civilians.

Advance warnings, precision munitions, and aerial surveillance were used to minimize civilian harm.

Israel says it will continue striking Hezbollah after the terror group chose to join the war under the sponsorship of Iran’s terror regime.
text_en:
**NEW**: The IDF confirms a new wave of strikes in Beirut, targeting additional Hezbollah terror command centers.

Among the targets: a headquarters used by Hezbollah’s aerial unit, involved in planning and executing attacks against Israeli forces and civilians.

Advance warnings, precision munitions, and aerial surveillance were used to minimize civilian harm.

Israel says it will continue striking Hezbollah after the terror group chose to join the war under the sponsorship of Iran’s terror regime.

text_orig: 🔥 **BREAKING:** The IDF says it has launched another major wave of strikes in Tehran, targeting infrastructure of the Iranian terror regime across the capital.
text_en: 🔥 **BREAKING:** The IDF says it has launched another major wave of strikes in Tehran, targeting infrastructure of the Iranian terror regime across the capital.
